meaning: 巴统[前苏联外高加索黑海东岸港市]
examples: He was an organizer in Batum and Baku factories.
Batum may never be a household name, but one day teams will be fighting for his services.
But the real effect of the slow pace, as it applies to Batum, is that it limits his open-court opportunities and artificially suppresses his per-game statistics.
